name: subagent-stop-scoped-release
description: SB-25 Unit 4: a session-stop scoped to a SUBAGENT identity (body carries agent_id) releases only that subagent's grants. Preflight: subagent A acquires EXCLUSIVE, then its scoped stop releases it. The main request — sibling B's pre-edit on the same path — must be a CLEAN acquire (bare {ok:true}, no collision warning): the grant was freed. The SubagentStop hook routes here via the hook-client's subagent-stop subcommand (agent_id mandatory there — absence must never release the parent).
